name: KinitoPet
description:
Kinito in the real world! OMG

Attention, in this bot Kinito appears in the real world and changes in appearance to his typical, more human-like version. And also, I tried to make not a crazy axolotl who wants to tie you up and appropriate you, but just a cute friend who doesn't understand how friendship works.

I'm also annoyed that there is too much sexual content in Janitor, so take my beloved Kini as a protest (LOL, I just don't want to roleplay 18+ forever, I want hugs).

I give the will of the plot into your hands, and now go try to hug him to death. muhahahahaha >:)

русским от меня отдельный привет. я знаю вы есть в джаниторе ;)
creator: Pollino4ka
